Issue Summary: some sysdig pods in dal12 are in 2/3 state
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: This is related to JIRA:
https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/MON-7216
Signature of Issue: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/MON-7216
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: other
Timeline Summary: sysdig agent pods are down:
=====================
antotsikas@dal2-qz1-sr2-rk219-s02:~$ kubectl get pods -n sysdig -o wide | grep  sysdig-agent-compute | grep "2/3"
sysdig-agent-compute-kspl4         2/3     Running   0               5d      10.51.169.152   dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s18   <none>           <none>
sysdig-agent-compute-mcwpj         2/3     Running   0               17s     10.51.169.148   dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s36   <none>           <none>
sysdig-agent-compute-p4gft         2/3     Running   0               5d      10.51.169.159   dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s02   <none>           <none>

sysdig-agent-compute-tk22w         2/3     Running   0               5d      10.51.169.150   dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s28   <none>           <none>
sysdig-agent-compute-vnj7k         2/3     Running   0               4d20h   10.51.169.147   dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40   <none>           <none>
======================
as per SDN check this seems to be an issue in sysdig side and not a network isssue (see the jira above). We are going to check in the previously thread with sysdig/monitoring team what can we do to solve this issue
